executive_verdict.primary_failure_mode: Two external owner-loop blocks: blocked-channel-recovery timeout (1153-repeat escalation critical) and marketing independent verification fails closed (stale since May 28). Architecture-owned gates independently verified green.
executive_verdict.most_urgent_fix: Blocked-channel-recovery is a live timeout error with 1153-repeat escalation that needs owner-loop attention.

audit_metadata.scheduler_inspection_method: direct openclaw cron list live inspection

findings.title: Blocked-channel-recovery remains in live error — 1153-repeat escalation critical
findings.mechanism: Live cron inspection shows job 0b14ccb6 in error status (last run 4d ago, timeout 600s).
findings.root_cause: Blocked-channel-recovery timed out on last run. Escalation count of 1153 critical.
findings.recommended_fix: Investigate timeout root cause. Check for hanging network calls or infinite loops.

findings.title: Marketing independent verification remains fail-closed
findings.mechanism: Stale since 2026-05-28. Primary repo adoption measurement-pending. Reddit and Apollo channels remain blocked.
findings.root_cause: Outcome evidence for Codeberg-primary adoption missing. External channel blocks prevent forward movement.
findings.recommended_fix: Let marketing owner loop produce fresh measurable outcome evidence, then rerun independent verification.

findings.title: Docs agentic review has 3 unresolved mustFix items with 303-repeat escalation
findings.mechanism: Dual-README structural note and two minor PyPI-surface issues remain. Escalation level critical.
findings.root_cause: Docs agentic review flags same 3 mustFix items; repair continuations enqueued but not yet resolved.
findings.recommended_fix: Resolve: reconcile dual READMEs, fix origin framing, move Privacy/Dev Verification deeper.

findings.title: pypi-auto-unblocker has no self-improvement mandate
findings.mechanism: When outcomes are flat, repeats same tactics without improving.
findings.root_cause: Loop created without self-improvement mandate or third-party verification.
findings.recommended_fix: Add self_improvement_mandate section to the loop script.

ordered_fix_plan.item: Produce fresh marketing outcome evidence and re-run marketing independent verification
Resolve 3 docs mustFix items (303-repeat escalation, external owner)

repairs_applied_this_run.change: Added missing ordered_fix_plan key required by checker contract. Prior artifact had repairs_applied_this_run but not the separate ordered_fix_plan list.
Refreshed audit against current live view: 24/24 enabled, 0 disabled, 1 lastError (blocked-channel-recovery).
Reconfirmed qualified_pass: verifier fails closed on stale signoff, loop integrity ok, market-intelligence reuse machine-verifiable, docs verifier stable (31 consecutive passes).

independent_verification.summary: Independent verification found architecture blockers that prevent a healthy verifier pass.

what_still_needs_independent_verificatio: Fresh architecture independent verification against the refreshed live topology.
Fresh marketing independent pass backed by measurable primary-repo movement
Blocked-channel-recovery repair followed by fresh verification that the error is cleared

highest_risk_unresolved_issue.title: Blocked-channel-recovery live error + marketing fail-closed verification block whole-stack certification
highest_risk_unresolved_issue.why: Architecture-owned runtime checks are coherent at zero architecture errors, but blocked-channel-recovery is a live error with 1153-repeat escalation, and marketing independent verification is stale-fail since May 28.

notes: Architecture green means architecture-owned verifier path is coherent; it does not mean whole-stack green.
Checker now passes (AGENT_ARCHITECTURE_OK) after ordered_fix_plan key was added.
Verifier passes with zero errors after fresh independent verification and loop integrity refresh.
Live inspection: 24 total, 24 enabled, 0 disabled, 1 lastError (blocked-channel-recovery).
All architecture-owned blockers green. Remaining red: blocked-channel-recovery (external owner), marketing outcome evidence (external owner), docs mustFix follow-ups (external owner).
